headline: MERC vs IP: Paper and Packaging Giants Go Head-to-Head
summary: Mercer International (NASDAQ:MERC) just reported a Q4 2025 that was, in a word, brutal. International Paper (NYSE:IP) had its own messy quarter, buried under restructuring charges from its DS Smith transformation. Both companies deal in forest products and pulp, but they are moving in opposite directions at very different speeds. One Is Surviving. The Other ... MERC vs IP: Paper and Packaging Giants Go Head-to-Head
